calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-15-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of two Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
Petitioners Van Nhu Trieu and Lan Thi Nguyen, were present in pro per as Guardians ad litem with the Minors, Man Gia Nguyen and Bao Gia Trieu.
Petitioners were placed under oath and examined.
Cam Trieu was placed under oath, and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioners.
Proof of Publication in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors from Man Gia Nguyen to Carmen Trieu, and from Bao Gia Trieu to Cammy Trieu.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
